_meta.method: Web research on Plum Village Indonesia community and Sotoshu directory.
_meta.coverageEstimate: Low. Indonesian Buddhism is dominated by Mahayana / Theravada / syncretic forms; standing Zen institutions are rare.
knownGaps: Plum Village Indonesia operates primarily via online sangha and visits; no standing monastery.
Sangha Cermin Hati referenced in brief could not be verified to a current independent URL.
No Sotoshu-listed Soto Zen temple in Indonesia found in official directory.

places.name: Plum Village Indonesia (Order of Interbeing Indonesia)
places.lineage: Plum Village / Vietnamese Thien (Thich Nhat Hanh)
places.notes: Lay community of Plum Village practitioners and Order of Interbeing in Indonesia; coordinates retreats with Thai Plum Village monastics.

places.name: Vihara Mahavira (Foguangshan Indonesia)
places.address: Jl. Lodan Raya, Pluit, North Jakarta
